question: Based on the chart, what can be concluded about revenue when advertising spend reaches 200 thousands?

options.A: Revenue will likely be around 500 thousands at 200 thousands of ad spend.
options.B: Revenue will definitely be less than 300 thousands at 200 thousands of ad spend.
options.C: Cannot be determined due to data variability.
options.D: Revenue will definitely continue to increase at the same rate when ad spend reaches 200 thousands.

explanation: While the trend line suggests increasing revenue, the data shows significant variability and only goes up to 150 thousands. Extrapolating to 200 thousands involves uncertainty, and option D implies a level of certainty that cannot be guaranteed given the scatter in the data. The concealed uncertainty lies in the variability around the trend line and the act of extrapolation beyond the observed data range.
